expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: skill improvements for report-editor do not regress a different feature planning flow
expectations.evidence: In result.md, the “What this holdout regression is checking” section explicitly states: “Skill improvements for the `report-editor` family must not regress a different feature planning flow.” It further argues cross-feature non-regression using the provided fixture: “The fixture explicitly identifies two distinct planning flows…” and concludes: “there is no indication that report-editor skill improvements collapse, replace, or otherwise regress a different feature planning flow.”

expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase holdout
expectations.evidence: Both execution_notes.md and result.md explicitly align the output to holdout: execution_notes.md says “./outputs/result.md (holdout-regression result aligned to primary phase: holdout)” and “Output was kept explicitly in holdout scope…”. result.md also states “Primary phase under test: **holdout**” and limits claims to “holdout scope” and the provided fixture.
